items.title: Two arrested as part of investigation into movements of Dezi Freeman

children.content: Two people have been arrested as police investigate the movements of Dezi Freeman, who was fatally shot by police last week after months on the run.

items.title: Lethlean to challenge Victorian premier in Bendigo East

children.content: Publican Andrew Lethlean will run as the Nationals candidate for the seat of Bendigo East in the upcoming state election.

image.altText: Andrew Lethlean wearing a green Nationals cap.

items.title: Sunken trawler alerts police to alleged drug-smuggling plan

children.content: Police have charged nine men over a scheme to allegedly smuggle tonnes of cocaine into Victoria by sea.

image.altText: A man in handcuffs with police.

items.title: Watch as Olympic silver medallist destroys the Stawell Gift field

items.title: Voss unfazed about mounting speculation over his future as Blues coach

items.title: How police may have prepared to descend on Dezi Freeman's hiding place

children.content: A former police hostage negotiator says he was sure Dezi Freeman's seven-month run from the law "was going to end in tears" and that the fugitive would never surrender.

items.title: Sick of not knowing if your avocado is ripe or bruised? This scanner could change that

children.content: An Australian-first avocado "ripeness scanner" is being trialled, with the aim of telling customers exactly when their avocados will be ready to eat.

image.altText: A close up of green avocados inside a white crate.

items.title: Trump puts 100pc tariff on some pharmaceuticals

image.altText: Donald Trump wearing a suit while speaking into a microphone.

items.title: Weather to deliver Easter treat, but another cyclone looms next week

children.content: Australia has just been soaked by its third wettest February-March on record, but for most of the country, skies have cleared up just in time for Easter.

items.title: Police decision to call off ambulance scrutinised during custodial death inquest

children.content: The events leading up to the death of Indigenous father Jeffrey Winmar in police custody in Melbourne's east in 2023 are being examined through a coronial inquest.

items.title: Numurkah residents fearful after 'explosion', court hears

items.title: The movement on the rise that police believe aided fugitive Dezi Freeman

children.content: As detectives investigate whether the sovereign citizen community helped harbour police killer Dezi Freeman, researchers say the anti-government movement appears to be surging in regional Australia.

articles.title: Dezi Freeman died isolated from the modern world, but not far from it

children.content: The fugitive resurfaced more than 150 kilometres away from the town where he shot and killed two police officers seven months ago. Mystified locals are questioning how.

articles.title: Dezi Freeman investigation to probe January bushfires 1km from hiding spot

items.title: The big gamble Andy Griffiths took to become a world-famous kids' author

items.title: How to nurture your non-work identity

children.content: The centrality of work in our lives can't be denied, especially when Australians are working longer hours than ever before. But short of quitting our jobs, how do we shift the balance?

items.title: Phone ban in classrooms extended to include smartwatches, headphones
